## Description

<!-- Describe the change and why it is needed. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`pytest -q`)
- [ ] Frontend typechecks and builds (`npm run typecheck && npm run build` in `apps/desktop`)
- [ ] Documentation updated if behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, tokens, or private paths in the diff
- [ ] No unsafe external actions added (approval-gating preserved)
- [ ] If UI change, screenshots attached
- [ ] If DB schema change, migration notes included

## Related Issue

Fixes #(issue)
